title: ReviewFinding
description: Schema for structured findings produced during the map phase of codebase review.

chunk.description: Which review chunk this finding belongs to

finding.description: Concise description of the issue (1-2 sentences)

evidence.description: One or more file:line references proving this finding

file.description: Relative file path from repo root

line.description: Line number (null if the evidence is an absence)

user_facing.description: Does this affect what the end user sees?

data_integrity.description: Does this cause incorrect data to be stored or displayed?

runtime_crash.description: Can this cause a crash at runtime?

affected_endpoints.description: API endpoints affected by this finding

affected_pages.description: Dashboard pages affected by this finding

confidence.description: How confident are we in this finding?

needs_runtime_validation.description: Whether this finding requires runtime testing to fully verify

dependent_chunks.description: Other chunks that are affected by or depend on this finding

files_to_modify.description: Files that need to be changed

breaking_change.description: Does this fix change API contracts or data schemas?

rollback_plan.description: How to rollback if the fix causes issues

acceptance_test.description: How to verify the fix works

related_findings.description: IDs of findings that are related or need coordinated fixes

examples.finding: LOW_WIN_RATE_THRESHOLD is used but never defined in creative_analyzer.py, causing NameError at runtime.

evidence.description: Uses LOW_WIN_RATE_THRESHOLD in SQL parameter binding
Threshold constants section — LOW_WIN_RATE_THRESHOLD is NOT defined here

impact.description: Calling _check_low_win_rate() throws NameError. Latent crash — only triggers when reached_queries data exists.

fix.approach: Add LOW_WIN_RATE_THRESHOLD = 0.05 to the module constants (line ~34)
fix.rollback_plan: Remove the constant definition; behavior reverts to crash
fix.acceptance_test: Call _check_low_win_rate(days=7) with test data and verify no NameError

examples.finding: HIGH_WASTE_RATE_THRESHOLD is used but never defined in geo_analyzer.py, causing NameError at runtime.

evidence.description: Threshold constants section — HIGH_WASTE_RATE_THRESHOLD is NOT defined here

impact.description: Calling _check_high_waste_geos() throws NameError. Same latent crash pattern as ANALYTICS-001.

fix.rollback_plan: Remove the constant; behavior reverts to crash
fix.acceptance_test: Call _check_high_waste_geos(days=7) with test data and verify no NameError

examples.finding: selectedBuyerId missing from qps-summary query key causes cross-buyer cache contamination.

evidence.description: queryKey only includes days, not selectedBuyerId
But selectedBuyerId IS passed to the API call
Contrast: rtb-funnel query DOES include selectedBuyerId correctly

impact.description: When user switches buyers, QPS summary shows cached data from previous buyer. User sees wrong data.

fix.approach: Add selectedBuyerId to query key: queryKey: ['qps-summary', days, selectedBuyerId]
fix.acceptance_test: Switch between two buyer seats; verify QPS summary data changes immediately
